package.name: navflex_wm_bt_nodes
package.description: World-model BehaviorTree.CPP v3 plugin nodes for navflex frontier exploration. Adds a per-candidate go/no-go gate that runs the FrontierAStar planner's top viewpoint through the forward-dynamics world model + VLM critic (navflex_world_model/evaluate), plus a helper that extracts a path's endpoint as the goal pose. Kept in a SEPARATE package so the original exploration framework (navflex_bt_nodes, navflex_autonomous_exploration_bt) carries no dependency on the world model.
